title: Junior Business Development Manager at My Home Group

jsonLd.title: Junior Business Development Manager at My Home Group
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Business Development Manager looking for your next big career move? My Home Group in Vijayawada offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About My Home Group:
My Home Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in GIS Tools

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with My Home Group!
